rationale: The active war remains the overwhelming reality for Ukrainians; Putin's admission of economic and social strain from the war is a new and marginally positive signal, but no qualitative battlefield change occurred.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia — ongoing air strikes and infrastructure attacks
top_events.summary: No new major Russian escalation this cycle, but the war continues at the same operational tempo with persistent risk to Ukrainian lives and infrastructure.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Putin's rare public acknowledgment that the war is straining Russia's economy and society is a new signal that may indicate limits on Russian war capacity, a marginal positive for Ukraine.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: Reduced US military presence in Europe indirectly weakens the Western deterrence umbrella that supports Ukraine's security environment and aid pipeline.
